policy: Every tool returned by tools/list declares readOnlyHint, openWorldHint, destructiveHint, and idempotentHint. The live server is authoritative.

classes.name: persisted-market-and-cue-reads
classes.rationale: Reads Cuebook's persisted snapshots and public interpretations without modifying user or external state.

classes.name: private-paper-account-bootstrap
classes.rationale: The first portfolio read may initialize a private simulated account; it never places a real order.

classes.name: simulated-paper-order
classes.rationale: Creates an idempotent virtual fill inside Cuebook only.

classes.name: simulated-paper-close
classes.rationale: Irreversibly records a virtual close while never touching real funds or an exchange.

classes.name: frame-draft-and-publication
classes.annotations_source: The frozen Frame MCP tool contract
classes.rationale: Read, draft, upload, publish, correction, and withdrawal hints are declared per tool; public publication and signed upload are open-world actions, and withdrawal is destructive.
